S.n: Async-First Culture Is the Biggest Predictor of Remote Team Performance

B.x: CULTURE
Async-First Culture Is the Biggest Predictor of Remote Team Performance

I.x: Written communication norms documented in team handbooks
No-meeting Wednesdays or focus blocks protected calendar-wide
Decisions made in docs, not real-time calls
Response time expectations set explicitly (not assumed)
Promotion criteria decoupled from visibility and face-time
Global timezone equity in scheduling and participation

B.x: Teams rated 'async-mature' outperform sync-heavy peers by 31% on delivery speed and 22% on employee retention.
